content: Abraham Finch: It's been a long day, Abigail. The crops are looking good, but I can't shake this feeling of unease. Something tells me that we're not out of the woods yet. Abigail Finch: I understand, Abraham. But we've survived this long, haven't we? We're stronger than we think. And as long as we have each other, we'll make it through anything. Abraham Finch: You're right, Abigail. And speaking of which, how have you been holding up? I know things have been stressful lately, with Jake running away and everything. Abigail Finch: It's been difficult, Abraham. But I'm trying to stay strong for our family. I just want everything to go back to normal, you know? Abraham Finch: I do know, Abigail. And I'm sorry for my part in all of this. I shouldn't have let our arguments escalate so much.

Abigail Finch: Abraham, I think it's time for us to get some rest. It's been a long day, and we've got another one ahead of us tomorrow. Let's put our differences aside and focus on taking care of our family. Abraham Finch: Agreed, Abigail. Let's go to bed and get some much-needed sleep. We'll face whatever comes our way in the morning, together. Abigail Finch: That's right, Abraham. Together. Goodnight. Abraham Finch: Goodnight, Abigail.
